_meta.title: Letter Unit baa (ب) — bundled-seed Exercise configs (Schema v2)
_meta.signedOff: false everywhere — feedback lines are prototype-authored drafts; audioId/imageId are placeholders. Plan 07-07 seeds Firestore + the owner's mother signs off.
_meta.fallbackRole: This is the bundled-seed fallback read by CurriculumRepository.getExercises() when Firestore is empty (cold/offline first run).

prompt.line: Start at the gold dot and sweep a deep bowl, then the dot below.

feedback.pass: Beautiful — a deep, smooth bowl. أحسنت!
feedback.shallowBowl: A little shallow — give the bowl a deeper curve. Try again, slower.
feedback.noDot: The bowl is good — now place the dot just below it.

prompt.line: Trace the initial baa — no tail, it reaches forward to join.

feedback.pass: That's the initial shape — ready to join.
feedback.hasTail: No tail at the start — keep it small and flat. Try once more.

prompt.line: Trace the medial baa — a little tooth between two letters.

feedback.pass: Perfect little tooth — the medial baa.
feedback.tooBig: Smaller — a little tooth, no tail. Try again.

prompt.line: Trace the final baa — the bowl and its dot, tucked in at the end of the word.

feedback.pass: أحسنت! Now you have traced baa in every shape it takes.
feedback.noTail: The final baa keeps its little tail — finish the bowl with a small sweep up.
feedback.dotMisplaced: Good bowl — now put the dot right below it, not inside.

prompt.line: Listen, then write the letter the word starts with. No guide.

feedback.pass: Yes — “baṭṭa” starts with baa, and there it is.
feedback.wrongLetter: That's taa — listen again: بطة… b, b. Which letter makes that sound?

prompt.line: Look at the picture. Write the letter the word begins with.

feedback.shallowBowl: Make the bowl deeper with the dot below — that's baa.

prompt.line: Write baa the way it looks at the start of a word.

feedback.pass: That's the initial baa — from memory.
feedback.wrongForm: At the start, baa has no tail and reaches forward. Try again.

prompt.line: No dotted lines. Listen and write the whole word from memory.

feedback.pass: باب — from memory, no guide. Real writing! أحسنت!
feedback.missingDot: Close — your first baa needs its dot. Listen again: باب.

prompt.line: You saw the word for a moment — now write it from memory.

feedback.missingDot: Almost — check the second baa's dot. Try once more.

prompt.line: Look at the picture and write the whole word for it.

feedback.incomplete: That's the right start — finish the whole word, باب.

prompt.line: Here are the letters apart. Write them joined — keep your pen down across the word.

feedback.pass: Joined in one go — باب, “door.” أحسنت!
feedback.lifted: Don't lift between the letters — let baa reach across to join. Try again.

exercises._rewrite_19_05: D-09/D-12: original word كتاب needed kaaf+taa (unlearned in the baa unit). Rewritten to the alif+baa word باب, keeping the distinct teaching angle — baa returning in its FINAL positional shape at the word's end (baab teaches the join; this spotlights the final form). Ships signedOff:false: the mother confirms rewrite-vs-gate (and may prefer to gate كتاب to the kaaf/taa unit, or pick بابا) in 19-REVIEW-PACKET.md. The id is kept stable (a graph node references it); rename is the mother's later call.

prompt.line: Join these letters into one word — baba, dad!

feedback.pass: بابا — dad! Two smooth pairs, baa starting each one. أحسنت!
feedback.lifted: Keep each baa joined to its alif — two connected pairs.

exercises._rewrite_2026_07_18: Owner pick on device UAT 2026-07-18 (from the 19-REVIEW-PACKET alternatives): the word is بابا (dad) - alif+baa only, no duplicate of baab, and a word the child loves. baa takes its INITIAL shape at the start of each joined pair. Ships signedOff:false pending the mother. Id stays stable (graph node references it).

prompt.line: The word is almost there — write the missing letter in the gap.

feedback.wrongLetter: The missing letter is baa — deep bowl, dot below. Try again.

prompt.line: One becomes two. Write the dual of باب.

feedback.missingEnding: Add the dual ending ـان: بابان.

prompt.line: One becomes many. Write the plural of باب.

feedback.wrongForm: The plural of باب is أبواب. Listen and write it.

prompt.line: Write the opposite of كبير — “big.”

feedback.wrongAntonym: The opposite of big is small — صغير.

prompt.line: Read the sentence and write the missing word.

feedback.pass: البابُ كبير — you filled it in. أحسنت!
feedback.wrongWord: A describing word fits here — try كبير (“big”).

prompt.line: Listen to the whole sentence, then write it — word by word, in order.

feedback.pass: البابُ كبير — “the door is big.” A whole sentence! أحسنت!
feedback.wrongOrder: Good start — keep the words in order: البابُ كبير.

prompt.line: Look at the picture and write a sentence that tells what you see.

feedback.pass: البابُ كبير — you wrote a sentence. أحسنت!
feedback.incomplete: Name it, then describe it: البابُ كبير.

feedback.incomplete: Look again and write all of its letters.

feedback.incomplete: Look again and write all of its letters.
feedback.wrongWord: That's a different word — look at the word again: توت.

exercises._review: WORD SWAP (Lane B 2026-07-18): بيت→تفاح — no house art exists, apple art does; تفاح also demands fewer not-yet-taught letters (legal at faa 20 vs yaa 28). بيت still practiced in taa.connectWord.bayt. Mother confirms.

prompt.line: Write the word for the picture.

feedback.incomplete: That's the right start — finish the whole word, تفاح.
feedback.wrongWord: That's a different word — look at the picture and try again.

prompt.line: Join the letters into one connected word.

feedback.lifted: Keep the letters joined — one flowing word, no lifts.

prompt.line: Join the letters into one connected word.

feedback.lifted: Keep the letters joined — one flowing word, no lifts.

prompt.line: Fill in the missing taa to finish the word.

feedback.incomplete: Fill in the missing letter to finish the word.

exercises._review: LABEL FIX (D-16, 2026-07-19): letters[] ['taa']→['taa','waaw'] — the truthful deduped decomposition of توت (waaw had been mislabeled away). The exception covers reach-ahead, NEVER a false label. This card is then kept LIVE as an owner-approved exception (reaches ahead: waaw at unit 27), mother's verdict PENDING (Plan 25-06 packet / 25-07 walkthrough).

prompt.line: One becomes two. Write the dual of تاج.
Write the plural of بيت.
Write the opposite of تحت.
Write the word that completes the sentence.

feedback.wrongWord: Read the sentence again and pick the word that fits.

feedback.pass: التاجُ جميل — a whole sentence! أحسنت!
feedback.wrongOrder: Keep the words in order: التاجُ جميل.

prompt.line: Write the sentence for the picture, word by word.

feedback.pass: التفاحُ جميل — a whole sentence! أحسنت!

exercises._note: SUPPORT section: PromptHeader only, no WriteSurface.

prompt.line: This card just teaches — the sound and the shapes.
One clean line down — top to bottom.

feedback.tooShort: Make your alif taller — draw it from the very top all the way down.
feedback.wrongDirection: Start at the top and pull straight down — not from the bottom up.
feedback.tooCurved: Keep your alif straight — one tall straight line, no curve.

prompt.line: Listen, then write the letter the word starts with.

feedback.wrongLetter: Listen again — which letter makes that sound?
feedback.tooShort: Make your alif taller — one line from the very top all the way down.
feedback.wrongDirection: Start at the very top and pull straight down.
feedback.tooCurved: Keep it straight — alif is one straight line, no curve.

prompt.line: Write alif — one tall, straight line.

feedback.pass: Yes — one tall, straight alif. أحسنت!
feedback.tooShort: Make your alif taller — one line from the very top all the way down.
feedback.wrongDirection: Start at the very top and pull straight down.
feedback.tooCurved: Keep it straight — alif is one straight line, no curve.

exercises._review: NEW DRAFT (owner-directed alif shrink, 2026-07-19): alif is now letter-level only — hear it, trace it, write its form, and name what a word STARTS with (أسد + the lion art). Modeled on taa.writeLetter.fromPicture. Mother confirms wording + art.

prompt.line: Write the letter this picture's word starts with.

feedback.pass: Yes — أسد starts with ا. أحسنت!
feedback.wrongLetter: Listen: أَسَد — ah… it starts with alif. Write ا.
feedback.unclear: Almost — draw alif tall and straight, top to bottom.

prompt.line: Just the dot this time. Place one small dot right below the bowl.

feedback.pass: There it is — the dot sits just under the bowl. أحسنت!
feedback.noDot: The bowl is good — now place one small dot just below it.
feedback.dotOffCenter: Almost — bring the dot right under the middle of the bowl. Try once more.
feedback.dotAbove: baa's dot goes below the bowl, not above — a little lower.

prompt.line: Just the bowl this time. Sweep one deep, smooth curve — no dot yet.

feedback.shallowBowl: Give the bowl a deeper curve — scoop lower before you lift. Try again, slower.
feedback.tooFlat: Less flat — let the middle dip down into a real bowl.

prompt.line: Just the start this time. Begin at the gold dot on the right, then sweep across.

feedback.pass: You started in the right place — right first, then sweep. أحسنت!
feedback.wrongStart: Start on the right side, not the left — begin at the gold dot.
feedback.wrongDirection: Sweep from the start point across, not backwards. Try once more.

exercises._note: SUPPORT section: teaches only, no write surface.

prompt.line: This card just teaches — the sound and the shapes.
Trace Thaa — isolated form.

feedback.shallowBowl: Give the tooth a fuller curve — try again, a little slower.
feedback.noDot: Now add thaa's three dots, sitting together just above.
feedback.dotMisplaced: Keep the three dots close and even, right above the tooth.

prompt.line: Trace Thaa — initial form.

feedback.shallowBowl: Give the tooth a fuller curve — try again, a little slower.
feedback.noDot: Now add thaa's three dots, sitting together just above.
feedback.dotMisplaced: Keep the three dots close and even, right above the tooth.

prompt.line: Trace Thaa — medial form.

feedback.shallowBowl: Give the tooth a fuller curve — try again, a little slower.
feedback.noDot: Now add thaa's three dots, sitting together just above.
feedback.dotMisplaced: Keep the three dots close and even, right above the tooth.

prompt.line: Listen, then write the letter the word starts with.

feedback.wrongLetter: That's taa — thaa has THREE dots. Listen again and add all three.
feedback.wrongForm: Check the form — at the start, thaa reaches forward. Try again.

prompt.line: Write the letter this picture's word starts with.

feedback.wrongLetter: That's taa — thaa has THREE dots. Look at the picture's word and add all three.
feedback.wrongForm: Check the form — at the start, thaa reaches forward. Try again.

prompt.line: Write Thaa in its isolated form.

feedback.wrongForm: Check the form — thaa in its isolated shape. Try again.
feedback.shallowBowl: Give the tooth a fuller curve, then the three dots on top.

prompt.line: Listen and write the whole word.

feedback.pass: ثعلب — from memory. Real writing! أحسنت!
feedback.missingDot: One of your thaa's is missing a dot — it needs all three.
feedback.incomplete: Look again and write all of its letters.

prompt.line: Copy the word.

feedback.missingDot: One of your thaa's is missing a dot — it needs all three.
feedback.incomplete: Good start — now copy the whole word.

prompt.line: Write the word for the picture.

feedback.missingDot: One of your thaa's is missing a dot — it needs all three.
feedback.incomplete: Good start — now finish the whole word.

prompt.line: Join the letters into one connected word.

feedback.lifted: Don't lift between the letters — let thaa join across. Try again.
feedback.incomplete: Good start — now join all of its letters.

prompt.line: Join the letters into one connected word.

feedback.lifted: Don't lift between the letters — let thaa join across. Try again.
feedback.incomplete: Good start — now join all of its letters.

prompt.line: Fill in the missing Thaa to finish the word.

feedback.missingDot: Your thaa needs all three dots, sitting together above.
feedback.incomplete: Good start — write the missing thaa to finish the word.

exercises._review: DUAL — regular sound dual (+ان) is a best-effort DRAFT; confirm with the mother.

prompt.line: One becomes two. Write the dual of ثعلب.

feedback.missingEnding: Almost — add the ending that makes it two.
feedback.wrongForm: Not quite the dual — keep the word, then add the two-ending.

exercises._review: PLURAL — NEEDS THE MOTHER (broken plurals are irregular). Placeholder expected.

prompt.line: Write the plural of ثعلب.

feedback.missingEnding: Almost — add the ending that makes it many.
feedback.wrongForm: Not quite the plural — try that ending again.

exercises._review: OPPOSITE — NEEDS THE MOTHER (choose an age-right antonym pair).

prompt.line: Write the opposite.

feedback.wrongAntonym: That's not the opposite — think of the word that means the reverse.
feedback.wrongForm: Close — write the opposite word neatly and try again.

prompt.line: Write the word that completes the sentence.

feedback.wrongWord: That's not the word — read it again and pick the thaa word.
feedback.incomplete: Good start — write the whole word.

feedback.pass: الثعلبُ كبير — a whole sentence! أحسنت!
feedback.wrongOrder: Right words — now put them in the right order.
feedback.incomplete: Almost — write the whole sentence, word by word.
